response: guest i am stefan muller, seeking to join in2code in rosenheim as an apprentice for technical application development. guest i have a wirtschaftsschulabschluss and have completed the fachoberschule but have stopped. guest i am interested in it since childhood and have developed small hobby projects in python. guest i am currently looking for a career opportunity and would like to apply for the position of apprentice for technical application development. guest i am inspired by the work of florian brocker and am eager to contribute to in2code's solutions for internet and intranet applications based on typo3. guest i am available to start at your earliest convenience.
